chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Revision No. S – 87 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 27.11.2025 None present for the applicant nor any intimation received; same was the position on the last two dates of hearing. Perusal of the record reflects that after filing instant Criminal Revision Application nobody has turned up to pursue it, which is pending on the file of this Court without any useful progress. The deliberate absence on the part of the applicant and his Counsel prima facie indicates either the purpose of filing instant Revision has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing the same. According, the instant Criminal Revision Application is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge ARBROHI/PS
